channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Plastics dumped in grass are of elcot avenue, 11th March
item.description:
Plastic sheets, plastic bags and plastic bottles and flytipped onto the area and spewing onto the pathway. please pick up. thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A section of road outside of 111 to 117 Priory Park Road, 11th March
item.description:
Several potholes across a section of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin bag on pavement, 11th March
item.description:
Abandoned bin bag on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agents board placed on Green, 11th March
item.description:
Estate agents board placed on shoulder of mutton green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bins and trolley, 11th March
item.description:
Please remove all of these. The overflowing bins will only encourage more littering, including the already disgraceful state of the church grounds. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The hedge takes up too much pavement space, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge takes up at least 50% of the pavement space and when a vehicle is parked there it’s almost impossible to pass without being brushed by the hedge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge taking up too much pavement space, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge is taking up at least 50% of the footpath space at the side of the house that leads to Chipperfield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge is taking up too much pavement, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge from this block is taking up too much pavement space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging hedge from property, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge from the block 78-84 Longbury Drive is taking up too much pavement space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing double yellow lines, 11th March
item.description:
There are missing double yellow lines on this stretch of road and when cars are parked on the left, buses and ambulances cannot get past. Urs a real danger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolves Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Knocked over pillar, trip hazard, near 3 prospect place, 11th March
item.description:
The pillar between the parking spaces has been knocked over causing many of the block paving bricks to raise and become loose. This is a trip hazard for the pole, the bricks, and the hole that has been created. it is also blocking access to the parking space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prospect Place, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Considerable amount of household rubbish dumped, 11th March
item.description:
A couple of fly-tippers dumping lots of their old household trash at the front of Hanworth House, junction of John Ruskin Street / Camberwell New Road Side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement, 11th March
item.description:
Very badly broken pavement along the pavement at the side of Clapham Common I trip whilst running and I have torn two ligaments in my hand as a result of this it is extremely dangerous as I was walking by this evening and another runner fell over as well

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, The Pavement, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A few big pot holes, 11th March
item.description:
Dangerous for cyclists and motorcycles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Thanet Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 11th March
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pathway, 11th March
item.description:
The pedestrian walk way behind my property 26 malthus path and all along the pathway there's glass been smashed mattress dumped on the pavement in the culldy sack neighbours bins over flowing with the wrong rubbish in them it needs a street team to give it a good going over please
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Owen Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basket ball court lighting, 11th March
item.description:
The flood lights for the basket ball court dont work and have not worked for some time now can you get them fixed please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes all down the hill., 11th March
item.description:
This road is getting worse and worse, with pot holes all the way down the hill. It is regularly used as a cut through off from Westhorne avenue. The bottom of the hill, near the bottom roundabout has big holes in. The whole road needs to be tarmac ed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car., 11th March
item.description:
This car has been outside since October 2025, and has not moved at all. It is making it difficult to turn left out of my property as it is very close to my exit.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage flooding from cover, 11th March
item.description:
Sewage flooding into the planters and it has a foul smell and is grey waste water with obvious sewage items such as tissue paper.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maran Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
